onset.Description: Onset time of the event, synchronized with the EEG recording clock.

duration.Description: Duration of the event. Zero (0) for instantaneous events.

sample.Description: Onset time of the event expressed in samples from the beginning of the recording.

type.Description: The category of the recorded event marker (e.g., stimulus presentation, response).

Levels.trigger: TTL pulse sent by stimulus presentation software.

value.Description: The raw numerical code of the event marker or TTL pulse.

Session_Name_.Description: Identifier for the current experimental session.

Trial_Index_.Description: Sequential index of the trial within the entire session (used by E-Prime/PsychoPy).

Trial_Recycled_.Description: Indicates if a trial was recycled (e.g., due to an error or artifact).

TRIAL_INDEX.Description: The main sequential index used for data analysis.

KEYPRESS.Description: The raw key pressed by the participant.

RESPONSE.Description: Categorical outcome of the participant's response.

RT.Description: Reaction Time: time elapsed between probe onset and button press.

Positions_list.Description: String representation of the coordinate list for all stimulus positions (e.g., E-Prime EBPoint objects).

Colors_list.Description: String representation of the RGB color codes used for all stimuli.

set_size.Description: The number of items presented in the visual working memory array.

DISPLAY_ON_TIME.Description: System timestamp when the main stimulus array was displayed.

KEY_RESPONSE_TIME.Description: System timestamp when the key response was logged.

DELAY_PERIOD_duration.Description: Duration of the retention interval/delay period.

trial_num.Description: The running index of the trial within the current block (same as TRIAL_INDEX or trial_num).

practice_status.Description: Indicates if the trial was part of a practice block.

block.Description: The sequential index of the experimental block.

probe_type.Description: The category of the probe stimulus.

change_probe.Description: Indicates if the probe item was a change from the memory array.

cue_direction.Description: Direction of the cue (e.g., left or right).

cue_image.Description: File name of the image used for the central cue.

expected_response.Description: The key the participant was expected to press for a correct response.

stimulus_position2ug.Description: Position index or coordinate for 2ug condition

probe_position.Description: The position of the probe stimulus on the screen.

position_color0.Description: Position index for the item with color 0.

position_color1.Description: Position index for the item with color 1.

position_color2.Description: Position index for the item with color 2.

position_color3.Description: Position index for the item with color 3.

position_color4.Description: Position index for the item with color 4.

position_color5.Description: Position index for the item with color 5.

probe_color0.Description: Color code/index of the probe in the first position.

probe_color1.Description: Color code/index of the probe in the second position (if applicable).

probe_position1.Description: Position index for the probe item 1.

probe_postion0.Description: Position index for the probe item 0.

ttl_probe.Description: TTL code for probe presentation event.

ttl_correct.Description: TTL code for a correct response event.

ttl_incorrect.Description: TTL code for an incorrect response event.

ttl_stimulus.Description: TTL code for stimulus array presentation event.
